hero.headline: Turn your team's learning into measurable ROI
hero.subheadline: ZeroEka gives L&D teams real-time visibility into skill gaps, learning velocity, and training outcomes across every team.

stats: 68% of L&D leaders say their current LMS lacks personalisation
Employees forget 90% of training content within a week without reinforcement
Companies lose $13.5M annually per 1,000 employees to ineffective training

solutions.title: Adaptive Learning Paths
solutions.description: Customise training journeys based on employee roles, goals, and existing skill gaps.

solutions.title: AI-Powered Content Engine
solutions.description: Automatically ingest and convert your internal documents into interactive training modules.

solutions.title: Real-Time Analytics
solutions.description: Gain full cohort visibility with granular tracking on learning velocity and completion rates.

solutions.title: Enterprise Integrations
solutions.description: Seamlessly connect with your existing HRIS, LMS, and single sign-on (SSO) providers.

security.headline: Enterprise-grade security. Built from day one.
security.sla: 99.9% uptime SLA. SOC 2 Type II in progress. GDPR and India DPDP compliant.
